title: AR Bundle
description: An exported accountable-record bundle. The unit the verifier operates on. Domain-neutral envelope; record contents are determined by the profile that produced the bundle.

schema.description: Bundle schema identifier. 'accountable-record-bundle-1' for AR-native bundles. Domain-specific bundles may use other schemas conforming to this shape.

profile.description: Profile identifier the bundle conforms to (e.g. JR.PROFILE.JUDICIAL). Verifier uses this to load claim set.

versions.description: Version declarations. accountable_record and implementing_system are required by AR.CLAIM.VERSIONING; domains add their own (e.g. judicial_record).

conformance.description: Conformance declarations. se, ar are required by AR.CLAIM.CONFORMANCE.*; domains add their own.

record_type.description: Record type as declared by the profile.

ir_profile.description: Optional. If declared, the record is IR-codified; the verifier can run trait conformance against it. If absent, the record is IR-naive.
